mapper.sql: id, event_id, event_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, aggregate_version, topic, message_key, payload, publish_state, retry_count, next_retry_time, published_at, last_error, source_type, source_ref_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_vmd_outbox ( id, event_id, event_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, aggregate_version, topic, message_key, payload, publish_state, retry_count, next_retry_time, published_at, last_error, source_type, source_ref_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{aggregateVersion}, #{topic}, #{messageKey}, #{payload}, #{publishState}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, #{publishedAt}, #{lastError}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_vmd_outbox t SET
t.publish_state = #{publishState},
t.retry_count = #{retryCount},
t.next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime},
t.published_at = #{publishedAt},
t.last_error = #{lastError},
t.aggregate_version = #{aggregateVersion},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_vmd_outbox t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_vmd_outbox t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_vmd_outbox t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT FROM tb_vmd_outbox t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_vmd_outbox t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
